name: io.github.privy-io/mcp-server
description: MCP server for Privy wallet infrastructure - create wallets, sign transactions, and manage policies with Claude and other AI agents. Supports Ethereum, Solana, and 10+ blockchain networks.

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your Privy App ID from the Privy Dashboard

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_APP_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Your Privy App Secret from the Privy Dashboard

environmentVariables.name: PRIVY_AUTHORIZATION_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key for signing operations on owner-controlled wallets (optional)
